nodes.context: The Camorra is the Neapolitan mafia, a major organized crime syndicate based in Campania, Italy.
A Camorra clan led by Mario Fabbrocino, operating in the Vesuvius area around Nola, Ottaviano, etc.
A coalition of Camorra clans formed in the 1980s to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
A powerful Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo, rival to the Nuova Famiglia.

edges.context: The Fabbrocino clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
The Fabbrocino clan was a leading member of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
The Nuova Famiglia was created to oppose the rising power of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
The Fabbrocino clan was in a violent feud with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata, including murders of family members.
